synced:
[00:05.53] Nice to meet you, where you been?
[00:08.15] I could show you incredible things
[00:10.60] Magic, madness, heaven, sin
[00:13.22] Saw you there and I thought
[00:15.12] "Oh, my God, look at that face
[00:17.65] You look like my next mistake
[00:20.02] Love's a game, wanna play?" Ay
[00:25.86] New money, suit and tie
[00:29.50] I can read you like a magazine
[00:31.30] Ain't it funny? Rumors fly
[00:33.75] And I know you heard about me
[00:35.38] So hey, let's be friends
[00:37.49] I'm dying to see how this one ends
[00:39.55] Grab your passport and my hand
[00:42.35] I can make the bad guys good for a weekend
[00:45.84] So it's gonna be forever
[00:47.75] Or it's gonna go down in flames
[00:49.84] You can tell me when it's over, mm
[00:52.68] If the high was worth the pain
[00:55.74] Got a long list of ex-lovers
[00:57.71] They'll tell you I'm insane
[00:59.88] 'Cause you know I love the players
[01:03.63] And you love the game
[01:05.82] 'Cause we're young, and we're reckless
[01:07.95] We'll take this way too far
[01:10.16] It'll leave you breathless, mm
[01:13.27] Or with a nasty scar
[01:15.30] Got a long list of ex-lovers
[01:17.39] They'll tell you I'm insane
[01:21.23] But I've got a blank space, baby
[01:24.22] And I'll write your name
[01:27.26] 
[01:30.88] Cherry lips, crystal skies
[01:33.18] I could show you incredible things
[01:36.31] Stolen kisses, pretty lies
[01:37.91] You're the King, baby, I'm your Queen
[01:40.86] Find out what you want
[01:41.94] Be that girl for a month
[01:45.77] Wait, the worst is yet to come, oh, no
[01:50.42] Screaming, crying, perfect storms
[01:53.25] I can make all the tables turn
[01:55.65] Rose garden filled with thorns
[01:58.28] Keep you second guessing like
[02:00.27] "Oh, my God, who is she?"
[02:02.46] I get drunk on jealousy
[02:04.97] But you'll come back each time you leave
[02:07.56] 'Cause, darling, I'm a nightmare dressed like a daydream
[02:10.32] So it's gonna be forever
[02:12.82] Or it's gonna go down in flames
[02:15.46] You can tell me when it's over, mm
[02:17.84] If the high was worth the pain
[02:20.38] Got a long list of ex-lovers
[02:22.85] They'll tell you I'm insane
[02:25.49] 'Cause you know I love the players
[02:27.82] And you love the game
[02:30.49] 'Cause we're young, and we're reckless (oh)
[02:32.83] We'll take this way too far
[02:35.58] It'll leave you breathless, mm (oh)
[02:37.85] Or with a nasty scar
[02:40.33] Got a long list of ex-lovers
[02:42.77] They'll tell you I'm insane (insane)
[02:45.47] But I've got a blank space, baby
[02:48.95] And I'll write your name
[02:50.46] Boys only want love if it's torture
[02:55.26] Don't say I didn't, say I didn't warn ya
[03:00.15] Boys only want love if it's torture
[03:05.26] Don't say I didn't, say I didn't warn ya
[03:10.32] So it's gonna be forever
[03:12.89] Or it's gonna go down in flames
[03:15.43] You can tell me when it's over (over)
[03:17.85] If the high was worth the pain
[03:20.34] Got a long list of ex-lovers
[03:22.88] They'll tell you I'm insane (I'm insane)
[03:25.43] 'Cause you know I love the players
[03:27.82] And you love the game
[03:30.54] 'Cause we're young, and we're reckless
[03:33.10] We'll take this way too far (ooh)
[03:35.48] It'll leave you breathless, mm
[03:37.87] Or with a nasty scar (leave a nasty scar)
[03:40.42] Got a long list of ex-lovers
[03:42.93] They'll tell you I'm insane
[03:45.42] But I've got a blank space, baby
[03:49.21] And I'll write your name
[03:50.37]
plain:
Nice to meet you, where you been?
I could show you incredible things
Magic, madness, heaven, sin
Saw you there and I thought
"Oh, my God, look at that face
You look like my next mistake
Love's a game, wanna play?" Ay

New money, suit and tie
I can read you like a magazine
Ain't it funny? Rumors fly
And I know you heard about me
So hey, let's be friends
I'm dying to see how this one ends
Grab your passport and my hand
I can make the bad guys good for a weekend

So it's gonna be forever
Or it's gonna go down in flames
You can tell me when it's over, mm
If the high was worth the pain
Got a long list of ex-lovers
They'll tell you I'm insane
'Cause you know I love the players
And you love the game

'Cause we're young, and we're reckless
We'll take this way too far
It'll leave you breathless, mm
Or with a nasty scar
Got a long list of ex-lovers
They'll tell you I'm insane
But I've got a blank space, baby
And I'll write your name

Cherry lips, crystal skies
I could show you incredible things
Stolen kisses, pretty lies
You're the King, baby, I'm your Queen
Find out what you want
Be that girl for a month
Wait, the worst is yet to come, oh, no

Screaming, crying, perfect storms
I can make all the tables turn
Rose garden filled with thorns
Keep you second guessing like
"Oh, my God, who is she?"
I get drunk on jealousy
But you'll come back each time you leave
'Cause, darling, I'm a nightmare dressed like a daydream

So it's gonna be forever
Or it's gonna go down in flames
You can tell me when it's over, mm
If the high was worth the pain
Got a long list of ex-lovers
They'll tell you I'm insane
'Cause you know I love the players
And you love the game

'Cause we're young, and we're reckless (oh)
We'll take this way too far
It'll leave you breathless, mm (oh)
Or with a nasty scar
Got a long list of ex-lovers
They'll tell you I'm insane (insane)
But I've got a blank space, baby
And I'll write your name

Boys only want love if it's torture
Don't say I didn't, say I didn't warn ya
Boys only want love if it's torture
Don't say I didn't, say I didn't warn ya

So it's gonna be forever
Or it's gonna go down in flames
You can tell me when it's over (over)
If the high was worth the pain
Got a long list of ex-lovers
They'll tell you I'm insane (I'm insane)
'Cause you know I love the players
And you love the game

'Cause we're young, and we're reckless
We'll take this way too far (ooh)
